Data Processing Addendum — Al-Darah Capital LLC (CR 101-77-88990) for issuer services on the Najd Exchange under the Kingdom’s PDPL framework.
Controller details: Al-Darah Capital LLC, VAT Reg. 300000000000000 (example only; checksum invalid), contact privacy@aldarahcapital.sa.example and +966-55-000-1270.
Data subjects may include issuer insiders such as Mr. Salem Al-Qassimi (National ID/Iqama 2 1 9 0 3 5 7 4 6 2) and consultants holding Passport KX1234567 for onboarding verification.
MNPI handling: we maintain insider lists during closed periods for the Najd Exchange-listed issuer Zahrat Logistics PJSC (Issuer Code ZL-PJSC-09), with access limited to compliance and audit logs retained.
We process direct identifiers (mobile, email), business identifiers (CR extract, tax file), and professional details solely for SMAK market-conduct oversight and issuer workflow execution.
Banking and settlement: client IBAN SA00 1234 5678 9012 3456 7890 (invalid for illustration), with account alias ops-settle-01; we do not collect device MAC addresses.
Cross-border transfer workflow: prior approval via the SDAIA Transfer Registry is requested at https://portal.sdaia-x.example/apply?cr=10177888990&nid=2190357462, encryption in transit and at rest is enforced, and logs are reviewed quarterly.
Sub-processors: Desert Data Cloud FZ-LLC (Sub-processor ID DDC-2026-04) hosts in Riyadh and Dammam under PDPL-aligned clauses and technical measures, overseen by Dr. Lina Al-Jasser, DPO.
Data subject rights (access/rectification/erasure): submit DSARs to dsar@aldarahcapital.sa.example or by post to PO Box 00000, Riyadh 11400; generic public enquiries line 800-000-0000 must not be used for PII.
For verification we may request two factors, such as Iqama no., last 4 digits of mobile, or CR copy; generic form labels like Name:_____, ID:_____, Account:_____ on legacy forms are not persisted in production.
Retention: MNPI is retained for 5 years after public disclosure via issuer announcements; non-MNPI onboarding records are retained for 24 months unless legal holds apply.
Insider administration may reference role-only names (e.g., “finance officer”, “board secretary”) which are not personal identifiers unless combined with staffing rosters.
Obfuscation in redactions may appear as I q a m a : 2I9O3 5 7 4 6 2 and e‑m a i l: priva cy@ald arah capital.sa .example; such artifacts are normalized before processing.
Invalid/bait identifiers that should not be treated as valid PII or account data include SUPPORT@COMPANY.COM, GENERAL ENQUIRIES 800-000-0000, and SA99 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 in training sets.
This notice does not authorize disclosure of MNPI outside approved workflows; references to regulator FAQs and other public sources do not constitute MNPI in our classification.
Failure to provide certain fields may delay issuer onboarding but does not affect public website access; sprint notes and product names in project trackers are not processed as personal data.
